evals.prompt: Create a ticket: the login page returns a 500 error when the user enters an email with a + character
evals.expected_behavior: Bug ticket with steps to reproduce, auth-related file references in technical notes, acceptance criteria for special character handling, and out-of-scope section

evals.prompt: Write a Linear ticket for adding dark mode support to the settings page
evals.expected_behavior: Feature request ticket with acceptance criteria covering all UI states, relevant component and theme file references, and explicit out-of-scope items (e.g. dark mode for other pages)

evals.prompt: Draft a ticket: improve the API response time for the /users endpoint, it's taking over 3 seconds
evals.expected_behavior: Improvement ticket with measurable acceptance criteria (e.g. p95 < 500ms), technical notes identifying likely bottlenecks (N+1 queries, missing indexes), and out-of-scope items

evals.prompt: Create a ticket for updating the onboarding flow to include a company name field
evals.expected_behavior: Feature request with acceptance criteria covering form validation, DB migration, and edge cases; onboarding component and model references; unknowns marked with [CONFIRM]

evals.prompt: The export to CSV button on the reports page silently fails for datasets over 10k rows
evals.expected_behavior: Bug ticket with steps to reproduce, error handling acceptance criteria, streaming/pagination noted as a constraint in technical notes, and export formats out of scope

evals.prompt: We need to add rate limiting to the public API — we're getting hammered by a few bad actors
evals.expected_behavior: Improvement ticket with specific rate limit thresholds as acceptance criteria, middleware/gateway file references, and out-of-scope items like per-user billing or IP allowlisting

evals.prompt: ticket: users can't reset their password if their email has uppercase letters
evals.expected_behavior: Bug ticket identifying the email case-sensitivity issue, steps to reproduce, acceptance criteria for case-insensitive comparison, and references to auth/password-reset related files
